# Form Engine

> A config-driven React form library with a built-in declarative rules engine. Define forms as JSON (`IFormConfig`), swap UI libraries without rewriting logic, and let the engine handle conditional visibility, computed values, validation, and auto-save. 12 UI adapters (Fluent UI, MUI, Ant Design, Mantine, Chakra, Radix, React Aria, headless HTML, and more), a visual drag-and-drop form builder, and 4,700+ tests. MIT licensed. Built on react-hook-form v7.

## Key Capabilities

- **Declarative rules engine** -- 20 condition operators, AND/OR/NOT logic, priority-based conflict resolution, cross-field effects
- **Config-driven** -- forms defined as JSON data, not JSX; store in a database, generate from a builder, or configure at runtime
- **12 UI adapters** -- swap between Fluent UI, MUI, Ant Design, Mantine, Chakra, Radix, React Aria, headless HTML, Base Web, Atlaskit, HeroUI with one import change
- **Computed values** -- `$values.qty * $values.price`, custom `$fn.name()` functions, `$parent` references
- **Wizard forms** -- multi-step with conditional step visibility, per-step validation, cross-step rules
- **Validation registry** -- 14 built-in validators + custom sync/async/cross-field; debounce, AbortController, conditional `when`
- **Visual form builder** -- `@form-eng/designer` outputs IFormConfig JSON; drag-and-drop, rule builder, wizard configurator
- **Schema import** -- `fromRjsfSchema()` for JSON Schema migration, `zodSchemaToFieldConfig()` for Zod, `toRjsfSchema()` for export
- **i18n, accessibility, analytics** -- locale registry, ARIA live regions, focus-to-first-error, telemetry callbacks

## When to Use

**Use form-engine when:**
- Forms are data-driven -- stored in a database, generated by a builder, or configured by non-developers
- Field A changing to value X should make field B required, field C hidden, and field D's options change -- declared, not coded
- You need to swap UI libraries without rewriting form logic
- You want a visual builder for non-technical users

**Use something else when:**
- Simple forms with 3-5 static fields -- use react-hook-form directly
- You need JSON Schema rendering without a rules engine -- use [RJSF](https://github.com/rjsf-team/react-jsonschema-form)
- You want headless form state with zero rendering opinions -- use [TanStack Form](https://tanstack.com/form)
- You need the smallest possible bundle (~12 KB) -- use TanStack Form or react-hook-form

## Quick Start

```tsx
import { RulesEngineProvider, InjectedFieldProvider, FormEngine } from "@form-eng/core";
import { createFluentFieldRegistry } from "@form-eng/fluent";
// Or: createMuiFieldRegistry, createHeadlessFieldRegistry, createAntdFieldRegistry, etc.

const formConfig = {
  version: 2 as const,
  fields: {
    name: { type: "Textbox", label: "Name", required: true },
    role: {
      type: "Dropdown", label: "Role",
      options: [{ value: "admin", label: "Admin" }, { value: "user", label: "User" }],
    },
    adminCode: {
      type: "Textbox", label: "Admin Code", hidden: true,
      rules: [{
        when: { field: "role", operator: "equals", value: "admin" },
        then: { hidden: false, required: true },
        else: { hidden: true },
      }],
    },
  },
  fieldOrder: ["name", "role", "adminCode"],
};

<RulesEngineProvider>
  <InjectedFieldProvider injectedFields={createFluentFieldRegistry()}>
    <FormEngine
      configName="myForm" programName="myApp"
      formConfig={formConfig} defaultValues={{ name: "", role: "" }}
      saveData={async (data) => data}
    />
  </InjectedFieldProvider>
</RulesEngineProvider>
```

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/README.md): Full usage guide, field types, architecture, examples
- [Comparison](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/comparison.md): Honest comparison vs RJSF, TanStack Form, Formik, uniforms, SurveyJS, Form.io
- [Choosing an Adapter](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/choosing-an-adapter.md): Which adapter for your UI framework
- [Field Config Reference](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/field-config-reference.md): IFieldConfig v2 properties
- [Rules Engine](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/rules-engine.md): Lifecycle, dependency graph, evaluation
- [Expression Syntax](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/expression-syntax.md): $values, $fn, $parent expressions
- [Condition Operators](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/condition-operators.md): All 20 operators
- [Accessibility](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/ACCESSIBILITY.md): WCAG 2.1 AA, ARIA, keyboard
- [SSR / Next.js](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/ssr-guide.md): App Router, Pages Router, lazy loading
- [shadcn Integration](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/shadcn-integration.md): Radix + Tailwind setup
- [Creating an Adapter](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/creating-an-adapter.md): Build a custom UI adapter
- [Documentation Index](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/docs/README.md): Full doc listing

## Packages

- [`@form-eng/core`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/core): Rules engine, form orchestration, validation, analytics, devtools (~114 KB ESM)
- [`@form-eng/fluent`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/fluent): Fluent UI v9 adapter (28 field types, ~39 KB)
- [`@form-eng/mui`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/mui): Material UI adapter (28 field types, ~39 KB)
- [`@form-eng/headless`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/headless): Unstyled semantic HTML (28 field types, ~36 KB)
- [`@form-eng/antd`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/antd): Ant Design v5 adapter (28 field types, ~24 KB)
- [`@form-eng/chakra`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/chakra): Chakra UI v3 adapter (28 field types, ~24 KB)
- [`@form-eng/mantine`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/mantine): Mantine v7 adapter (28 field types, ~24 KB)
- [`@form-eng/atlaskit`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/atlaskit): Atlassian Design System adapter (28 field types, ~22 KB)
- [`@form-eng/base-web`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/base-web): Uber Base Web adapter (28 field types, ~22 KB)
- [`@form-eng/heroui`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/heroui): HeroUI adapter (28 field types, ~22 KB)
- [`@form-eng/radix`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/radix): Radix UI primitives, unstyled (28 field types, ~32 KB)
- [`@form-eng/react-aria`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/react-aria): React Aria Components, accessibility-first (28 field types, ~31 KB)
- [`@form-eng/designer`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/designer): Visual drag-and-drop form builder (~65 KB)
- [`@form-eng/examples`](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/examples): 3 example apps (login+MFA, checkout wizard, data entry)

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/llms-full.txt): Extended reference with architecture, full API surface, all code examples
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): Detailed architecture, rendering pipeline, key directories
- Per-package LLM references: [core](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/core/llms.txt), [fluent](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/fluent/llms.txt), [mui](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/mui/llms.txt), [headless](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/headless/llms.txt), [antd](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/antd/llms.txt), [chakra](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/chakra/llms.txt), [mantine](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/mantine/llms.txt), [atlaskit](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/atlaskit/llms.txt), [base-web](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/base-web/llms.txt), [heroui](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/heroui/llms.txt), [radix](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/radix/llms.txt), [react-aria](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/react-aria/llms.txt), [designer](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/blob/main/packages/designer/llms.txt)
